files.rejection_reason: Content pre-check (real vision LLM call): title page reads 보험금사정서, page 4 states a completed adjuster's payout opinion (10,000,000원), signed by licensed adjuster 김태윤 (바른결손해사정, BD00001058호). Answer-key-class material, same pattern as CASE_002's D1 finding.

content_warning.evidence: FLAGGED: title page "보험금사정서" (insurance claim adjustment report) by 바른결손해사정, page 4 states "보험금 사정 의견... 피보험자 '윤광석'님의 보험금으로 타당하다고 판단됩니다" with 사정금액 10,000,000원 stated and signed by 책임사정사 김태윤 — a completed, signed professional adjustment conclusion with stated payout.

files.rejection_reason: Content pre-check (real vision LLM call): title page 보험금사정서, cover letter to NH농협손해보험 stating adjustment complete, p4 states 20,000,000원 payout opinion, signed licensed adjuster 김태윤 (BD00001058호). Matches CASE_002 DOC_002 exactly.

files.rejection_reason: Content pre-check (real vision LLM call): title page 보험금사정서 addressed to 삼성화재, 20,000,000원 payout stated, signed licensed adjuster 김태윤 (BD00001058호). Matches CASE_002 DOC_003 exactly.

BD00001058호) signed/stamped — a completed, submitted professional adjustment report, not raw claim material.
